headline: Cassidy Loses Senate Primary in Louisiana, as Trump Vanquishes G.O.P. Foe
Cassidy Loses Senate Primary in Louisiana, as Trump Vanquishes G.O.P. Foe
Sen. Bill Cassidy’s run for re-election was cut short Saturday as voters heeded Trump’s call to oust the two-term Louisiana Republican, with the incumbent expected to finish third in the GOP primary
